testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
14:39:33.057 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.javatechie.SeatInventoryServiceApplicationTests]: SeatInventoryServiceApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 14:39:33.312 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.javatechie.SeatInventoryServiceApplication for test class com.javatechie.SeatInventoryServiceApplicationTests
